Kaggle or Colab, or download it for use with an IDE or local Jupyter installation, by clicking one of the
above links.</Tip>




export const quartoRawHtml =
[`
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Query Type</th>
<th>Use Case</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><strong>Text to Video</strong></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">“Find clips of a man giving a speech”</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><strong>Image to Video</strong></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Find videos visually similar to a photo</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><strong>Audio to Video</strong></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Find videos with similar speech/sounds</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><strong>Video to Video</strong></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Find videos similar to a clip</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`<style type="text/css">
#T_9bd92_row0_col0 {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: bold;
}
</style>
`,`
<table id="T_9bd92" data-quarto-postprocess="true">
<tbody>
<tr>
<td id="T_9bd92_row0_col0" class="data row0 col0">view
'twelvelabs_demo/video_chunks' (of 'twelvelabs_demo/videos')</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`
<style type="text/css">
#T_23d94 th {
  text-align: left;
}
#T_23d94_row0_col0, #T_23d94_row0_col1, #T_23d94_row0_col2, #T_23d94_row1_col0, #T_23d94_row1_col1, #T_23d94_row1_col2, #T_23d94_row2_col0, #T_23d94_row2_col1, #T_23d94_row2_col2, #T_23d94_row3_col0, #T_23d94_row3_col1, #T_23d94_row3_col2, #T_23d94_row4_col0, #T_23d94_row4_col1, #T_23d94_row4_col2, #T_23d94_row5_col0, #T_23d94_row5_col1, #T_23d94_row5_col2, #T_23d94_row6_col0, #T_23d94_row6_col1, #T_23d94_row6_col2 {

<td id="T_23d94_row0_col2" class="data row0 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row1_col0" class="data row1 col0">segment_start</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row2_col0" class="data row2 col0">segment_start_pts</td>

<td id="T_23d94_row2_col2" class="data row2 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row3_col0" class="data row3 col0">segment_end</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row3_col1" class="data row3 col1">Float</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row3_col2" class="data row3 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row4_col0" class="data row4 col0">segment_end_pts</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row4_col1" class="data row4 col1">Int</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row4_col2" class="data row4 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row5_col0" class="data row5 col0">video_segment</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row5_col1" class="data row5 col1">Required[Video]</td>
<td id="T_23d94_row5_col2" class="data row5 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_23d94_row6_col0" class="data row6 col0">video</td>

<td id="T_23d94_row6_col2" class="data row6 col2"></td>
</tr>

</table>

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td id="T_cc914_row0_col0" class="data row0 col0">title</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row0_col1" class="data row0 col1">String</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row0_col2" class="data row0 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_cc914_row1_col0" class="data row1 col0">description</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row1_col1" class="data row1 col1">String</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row1_col2" class="data row1 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_cc914_row2_col0" class="data row2 col0">thumbnail</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row2_col1" class="data row2 col1">Image</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row2_col2" class="data row2 col2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_cc914_row3_col0" class="data row3 col0">text_content</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row3_col1" class="data row3 col1">String</td>
<td id="T_cc914_row3_col2" class="data row3 col2">(title + '. ') +
description</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`
<style type="text/css">
#T_a9349 th {
  text-align: left;
}
#T_a9349_row0_col0, #T_a9349_row0_col1, #T_a9349_row0_col2, #T_a9349_row0_col3, #T_a9349_row1_col0, #T_a9349_row1_col1, #T_a9349_row1_col2, #T_a9349_row1_col3 {

`,`
<table id="T_a9349" data-quarto-postprocess="true">
<thead>
<tr>
<th id="T_a9349_level0_col0" class="col_heading level0 col0"

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td id="T_a9349_row0_col0" class="data row0 col0">idx4</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row0_col1" class="data row0 col1">text_content</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row0_col2" class="data row0 col2">cosine</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row0_col3" class="data row0 col3">embed(text_content,
None, model_name='marengo3.0')</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td id="T_a9349_row1_col0" class="data row1 col0">idx5</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row1_col1" class="data row1 col1">thumbnail</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row1_col2" class="data row1 col2">cosine</td>
<td id="T_a9349_row1_col3" class="data row1 col3">embed(thumbnail,
model_name='marengo3.0')</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`
<table class="dataframe" data-quarto-postprocess="true" data-border="1">
<thead>
<tr style="text-align: right;">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">title</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">text_content</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">score</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Mountain Hiking</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Mountain Hiking. Hikers climbing a steep mountain trail with scenic
views.</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">0.539</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Beach Sunset</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Beach Sunset. A beautiful sunset over the ocean with palm
trees.</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">0.435</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`
<table class="dataframe" data-quarto-postprocess="true" data-border="1">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="text-align: right;">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">title</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">thumbnail</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">score</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Beach Sunset</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><div class="pxt_image" style="width:240px;">
                <img
src="data:image/webp;base64,"
width="240" />             
</div></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">0.759</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Mountain Hiking</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><div class="pxt_image" style="width:240px;">
                <img
src="data:image/webp;base64,"
width="240" />             
</div></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">0.742</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`,`
<table class="dataframe" data-quarto-postprocess="true" data-border="1">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="text-align: right;">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">title</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">thumbnail</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">score</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">City Street</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><div class="pxt_image" style="width:240px;">
                <img
src="data:image/webp;base64,"
width="240" />             
</div></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">0.135</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">Mountain Hiking</td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;"><div class="pxt_image" style="width:240px;">
                <img
src="data:image/webp;base64,"
width="240" />             
</div></td>
<td style="vertical-align: middle;">-0.003</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
`];

Twelve Labs provides multimodal embeddings that project text, images,
audio, and video into the **same semantic space**. This enables true
**cross-modal search** - the most powerful feature of this integration.

**What makes this special?** You can search a video index using *any*
modality:

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[0] }} />

This notebook demonstrates this cross-modal capability with video, then
shows how to apply the same embeddings to other modalities.

### Prerequisites

-   A Twelve Labs account with an API key
    ([playground.twelvelabs.io](https://playground.twelvelabs.io/))
-   Audio and video must be at least 4 seconds long

## Setup


```python
%pip install -qU pixeltable twelvelabs
```


```python
import getpass
import os

if 'TWELVELABS_API_KEY' not in os.environ:
    os.environ['TWELVELABS_API_KEY'] = getpass.getpass(
        'Enter your Twelve Labs API key: '
    )
```


```python
import pixeltable as pxt
import pixeltable.functions as pxtf

# Create a fresh directory for our demo
pxt.drop_dir('twelvelabs_demo', force=True)
pxt.create_dir('twelvelabs_demo')
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
Connected&nbsp;to&nbsp;Pixeltable&nbsp;database&nbsp;at:&nbsp;postgresql+psycopg://postgres:@/pixeltable?host=/Users/pjlb/.pixeltable/pgdata
Created&nbsp;directory&nbsp;&#x27;twelvelabs_demo&#x27;.
&lt;pixeltable.catalog.dir.Dir&nbsp;at&nbsp;0x138c2c150&gt;
</pre>

## Cross-Modal Video Search

Let’s index a video and search it using text, images, audio, and other
videos - all against the same index.

### Create Video Table and Index


```python
# Create a table for videos
video_t = pxt.create_table('twelvelabs_demo/videos', {'video': pxt.Video})

# Insert a sample video
video_url = 'https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/raw/main/docs/resources/The-Pursuit-of-Happiness.mp4'
video_t.insert([{'video': video_url}])
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
Created&nbsp;table&nbsp;&#x27;videos&#x27;.
Inserted&nbsp;1&nbsp;row&nbsp;with&nbsp;0&nbsp;errors&nbsp;in&nbsp;1.60&nbsp;s&nbsp;(0.63&nbsp;rows/s)
1&nbsp;row&nbsp;inserted.
</pre>


```python
# Create a view that segments the video into searchable chunks
# Twelve Labs requires minimum 4 second segments
video_chunks = pxt.create_view(
    'twelvelabs_demo/video_chunks',
    video_t,
    iterator=pxtf.video.video_splitter(
        video=video_t.video, duration=5.0, min_segment_duration=4.0
    ),
)

# Add embedding index for cross-modal search
video_chunks.add_embedding_index(
    'video_segment',
    embedding=pxtf.twelvelabs.embed.using(model_name='marengo3.0'),
)
```

Let’s look at the index we just added in the table metadata:


```python
video_chunks
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[1] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[2] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[3] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[4] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[5] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[6] }} />

The iterator created a larger table from our single video:


```python
video_chunks.count()
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
51
</pre>

### Text to Video Search

Find video segments matching a text description.


```python
sim = video_chunks.video_segment.similarity(string='pink')

video_chunks.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(3).select(
    video_chunks.video_segment, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[7] }} />

### Image to Video Search

Find video segments similar to an image.


```python
image_query = 'https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/raw/main/docs/resources/The-Pursuit-of-Happiness-Screenshot.png'

sim = video_chunks.video_segment.similarity(image=image_query)

video_chunks.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    video_chunks.video_segment, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[8] }} />

### Video to Video Search

Find video segments similar to another video clip.


```python
video_query = 'https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/raw/main/docs/resources/The-Pursuit-of-Happiness-Video-Extract.mp4'

sim = video_chunks.video_segment.similarity(video=video_query)

video_chunks.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    video_chunks.video_segment, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[9] }} />

### Audio to Video Search

Find video segments with similar audio/speech content.


```python
audio_query = 'https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/raw/main/docs/resources/The-Pursuit-of-Happiness-Audio-Extract.m4a'

sim = video_chunks.video_segment.similarity(audio=audio_query)

video_chunks.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    video_chunks.video_segment, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[10] }} />

## Embedding Options

For video embeddings, you can focus on specific aspects:

-   `'visual'` - Focus on what you see
-   `'audio'` - Focus on what you hear
-   `'transcription'` - Focus on what is said


```python
# Add a visual-only embedding column
video_chunks.add_computed_column(
    visual_embedding=pxtf.twelvelabs.embed(
        video_chunks.video_segment,
        model_name='marengo3.0',
        embedding_option=['visual'],
    )
)

video_chunks.select(
    video_chunks.video_segment, video_chunks.visual_embedding
).limit(2).collect()
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
Added&nbsp;51&nbsp;column&nbsp;values&nbsp;with&nbsp;0&nbsp;errors&nbsp;in&nbsp;19.81&nbsp;s&nbsp;(2.57&nbsp;rows/s)
</pre>

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[11] }} />

## Other Modalities: Text, Images, and Documents

Twelve Labs embeddings also work for text, images, and documents. Here’s
a compact example showing **multiple embedding indexes on a single
table**.


```python
# Create a multimodal content table
content_t = pxt.create_table(
    'twelvelabs_demo/content',
    {
        'title': pxt.String,
        'description': pxt.String,
        'thumbnail': pxt.Image,
    },
)

# Add computed column combining title and description
content_t.add_computed_column(
    text_content=content_t.title + '. ' + content_t.description
)

# Add embedding index on combined text column
content_t.add_embedding_index(
    'text_content',
    embedding=pxtf.twelvelabs.embed.using(model_name='marengo3.0'),
)

# Add embedding index on image column
content_t.add_embedding_index(
    'thumbnail',
    embedding=pxtf.twelvelabs.embed.using(model_name='marengo3.0'),
)
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
Created&nbsp;table&nbsp;&#x27;content&#x27;.
Added&nbsp;0&nbsp;column&nbsp;values&nbsp;with&nbsp;0&nbsp;errors&nbsp;in&nbsp;0.01&nbsp;s
</pre>


```python
# Insert sample content
content_t.insert(
    [
        {
            'title': 'Beach Sunset',
            'description': 'A beautiful sunset over the ocean with palm trees.',
            'thumbnail': 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/main/docs/resources/images/000000000025.jpg',
        },
        {
            'title': 'Mountain Hiking',
            'description': 'Hikers climbing a steep mountain trail with scenic views.',
            'thumbnail': 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/main/docs/resources/images/000000000139.jpg',
        },
        {
            'title': 'City Street',
            'description': 'Busy urban street with cars and pedestrians.',
            'thumbnail': 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/main/docs/resources/images/000000000042.jpg',
        },
        {
            'title': 'Wildlife Safari',
            'description': 'Elephants and zebras on the African savanna.',
            'thumbnail': 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/main/docs/resources/images/000000000061.jpg',
        },
    ]
)
```

<pre style={{ 'margin': '-20px 20px 0px 20px', 'padding': '0px', 'background-color': 'transparent', 'color': 'black' }}>
Inserted&nbsp;4&nbsp;rows&nbsp;with&nbsp;0&nbsp;errors&nbsp;in&nbsp;1.97&nbsp;s&nbsp;(2.03&nbsp;rows/s)
4&nbsp;rows&nbsp;inserted.
</pre>

We can see the two indexes we added in the schema:


```python
content_t
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[12] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[13] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[14] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[15] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[16] }} />

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[17] }} />


```python
# Search by text description
sim = content_t.text_content.similarity(string='outdoor nature adventure')

content_t.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    content_t.title, content_t.text_content, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[18] }} />


```python
# Search by image similarity
query_image = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/main/docs/resources/images/000000000001.jpg'

sim = content_t.thumbnail.similarity(image=query_image)

content_t.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    content_t.title, content_t.thumbnail, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[19] }} />


```python
# Cross-modal: Search images using text!
sim = content_t.thumbnail.similarity(string='shoe rack')

content_t.order_by(sim, asc=False).limit(2).select(
    content_t.title, content_t.thumbnail, score=sim
).collect()
```

<div style={{ 'margin': '0px 20px 0px 20px' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: quartoRawHtml[20] }} />

## Summary

**Twelve Labs + Pixeltable enables:**

-   **Cross-modal search**: Query video with text, images, audio, or
    other videos
-   **Multiple indexes per table**: Add embedding indexes on different
    columns
-   **Embedding options**: Focus on visual, audio, or transcription
    aspects
-   **All modalities**: Text, images, audio, video, and documents

### Learn More

-   [Twelve Labs Documentation](https://docs.twelvelabs.io/)
-   [Pixeltable Documentation](/)
